LightningComponentBundle.description: This helps users select and upload a file.

property.name: inputFieldId
property.label: Field Id
property.description: Unique ID for this component instance. Should match the Flow API Name.

property.name: fileUploadLabel
property.label: Field Label
property.description: Label shown to the user above the file input.

property.name: acceptedFormats
property.label: Accepted File Formats
property.description: Comma-separated list of accepted file types, e.g. .jpg,.pdf,.doc.

property.name: maxFileSizeInMB
property.label: Max File Size Allowed (MB)
property.description: Maximum file size allowed for each upload (MB).

property.name: required
property.label: Required?
property.description: If true, at least one file must be uploaded before proceeding.

property.name: allowMultipleFiles
property.label: Allow Multiple Files
property.description: If true, users can select multiple files.

property.name: maxFilesAllowed
property.label: Maximum Allowed Files
property.description: Maximum number of total files allowed for each upload.

property.name: useApexToSaveFile
property.label: Save Files via Apex?
property.description: If true, files are saved to Salesforce immediately via Apex. If false, files remain staged locally until processed.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Related Record ID
property.description: The Salesforce record ID to associate the uploaded files with (if saving via Apex).

property.name: filesUploaded
property.label: Uploaded File Names (Delimited)
property.description: Semi-colon delimited list of file names uploaded. Text variable. Output only.

property.name: uploadedFileNames
property.label: Uploaded File Names
property.description: Collection of uploaded file names. Output only.

property.name: contentDocumentIds
property.label: Content Document IDs
property.description: Collection of uploaded ContentDocument IDs. Output only.

property.name: contentVersionIds
property.label: Content Version IDs
property.description: Collection of uploaded ContentVersion IDs. Output only.
